entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: ang inspir ay designed sa paligid ng pangangatwiran, pagsasanay, recall, at paliwanag instead ng handing mga mag-aaral finished work.

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: inspir treats AI bilang isang enabler, hindi ang mission itself. Ang mission ay mas mahusay access matutoing: mas malinaw mga paliwanag, mas marami pagsasanay, mas malakas curiosity, at isang future kung saan bawat bata Maaari bang reach isang mahusay tutor para sa libre o very low cost.

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: Ginagawang guided AI learning sessions ng inspir ang kuryosidad, takdang-aralin, pagrerepaso, at malalaking tanong na nagpapaliwanag, nagtatanong pabalik, at tumutulong sa iyo na magsanay.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: Inspir gusto sa tulong sa ensuring pag-aaral dapat maging fun at para sa lahat. Tayo strive para sa isang araw education reaches sa lahat, everywhere sa pamamagitan ng technology. Pagsisimula kasama ang 1,415,422,077 sa India.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir went live bilang isang consumer-facing AI pag-aaral produkto within weeks ng ChatGPT's pampubliko release.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir works kasama ang mga paaralan sa offer iniangkop AI chat experiences para sa mga estudyante, ginawa sa paligid ng pagiging kumpidensyal, curriculum kailangan, at ang praktikal realities ng paaralan deployment.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Flashcard Builder ay designed sa paligid ng na aktibong pag-alala loop: Bumuo ng isang deck, subukan ang harap, reveal ang sagot, rate iyong recall, at Repasuhin ang misses until ang ideya sticks.

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir’s go-to-market grew mula sa isang existing offline network ng mga paaralan at universities na mayroon na engaged kasama ang extracurricular programmes at estudyante mga event. Na network helped inspir reach mas marami kaysa isa million mga user across ang libre platform at partner mga paaralan.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: inspir's mission ay gumawa pag-aaral accessible, engaging, enjoyable, at kapaki-pakinabang para sa lahat sa pamamagitan ng libre pampubliko AI pag-aaral mga tool.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's pampubliko mga mode let mga guro suriin ang produkto sa pamamagitan ng totoo pag-aaral flows bago considering isang paaralan deployment o isang iniangkop classroom pathway.

entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: inspir's work kasama retrieval-based pag-aaral systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, at open-source engagement sa paligid ng RAG evaluation. Ang kasalukuyan platform lives at inspirlearning.com habang susunod generation ay pagiging ginawa sa pampubliko sa pamamagitan ng inspir.uk at GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Inspiring individuals sa maging creative at mahusay ng withstanding ang AI revolution ay essential. Lamang providing essential products at mga serbisyo para sa libre sa mga iyon Sino ang maaaringnot afford sila at sustaining access para sa mga iyon Sino ang maaaring, Maaari bang world pursue happiness collectively.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Sa halip na magbigay ng mahabang sagot, tinutulungan ka ng inspir na pumili ng mas simpleng pundasyon, mas malalim na landas, o praktikal na halimbawa.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Interactive Instruction Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Matutunan ang doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, at proving mastery. Ang app bumubuo isang live lesson canvas sa paligid ng iyong layunin instead ng pagbabago instruction tungo sa isang long chat. Subukan: "Turuan mo ako ng financial modeling."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Matutunan ang Anything Kasama ang isang Libre AI tutor ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Curious tungkol sa absolutely anything? Magtanong, explore, at go deeper at iyong pace. Iyong buddy gumagawa mga ideya praktikal, memorable, at madali bumuo sa. Subukan: "Ipaliwanag ang paano ang stock merkado actually works."

entries.source: Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Matuto sa pamamagitan ng paggawa, paghahambing, pag-aayos, at pagpapatunay ng kahusayan kasama ang isang AI tutor na ginagawang aktibong aralin ang iyong layunin.

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Matuto sa pamamagitan ng paggawa, pagtingin, paghahambing, pag-aayos, at pagpapatunay ng kahusayan. Ang app ay bumubuo ng live lesson canvas sa paligid ng iyong layunin sa halip na gawing mahabang chat ang pagtuturo. Subukan ang: "Turuan mo ako ng financial modeling."

entries.value: Matuto ng mga nota, chords, scales, ritmo, mga ideya sa ear training, at kung paano binubuo ang mga kanta.

entries.source: Learners improving essays, presentations, messages, and public explanations.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral improving essays, presentations, messages, at pampubliko mga paliwanag.

entries.source: Learners memorizing ordered ideas, vocabulary, speeches, formulas, or facts that need a stronger mental hook.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na nagsasaulo ng mga nakaayos na ideya, bokabularyo, talumpati, formula, o mga katotohanang nangangailangan ng mas matibay na mental hook.

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral madalas search para sa mga prompt bago sila alam alin AI tool behavior sila kailangan. Ito pahina mga ruta mga iyon searches tungo sa ang tama pampubliko pag-aaral mode.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral madalas search kasama ang isang produkto sila na alam. Ang kapaki-pakinabang sagot ay hindi winner-take-all; ito ay alin tool behavior umaangkop ang gawain.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral paghahanda essays, discussions, debates, interviews, o decisions.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral paghahanda para sa mga test o pagsubok matandaan mga ideya lampas sa ang una paliwanag.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral paghahanda para sa mga test sino kailangan matandaan, magsanay, at repair mahina spots.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino ay staring at isang new paksa at kailangan ang una malinaw foothold.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino gawin hindi lang kailangan isa sagot; sila kailangan isang nauulit way sa keep going.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na stuck sa simula ng bagong asignatura o nangangailangan ng mas simpleng daan papasok sa mahirap na ideya.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na nakakalimot pagkatapos magbasa at nangangailangan ng praktikal na ritmo ng pag-review para sa mga konsepto, termino, o materyales sa pagsusulit.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino mayroon isang tiyak tanong at kailangan tulong now.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na may limitadong oras, malaking syllabus, at nangangailangan ng makatotohanang paraan sa pagrepaso nang hindi nagpapanggap na magkakapareho ang bigat ng lahat.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na mas madaling natatandaan ang mga ideya sa pamamagitan ng naratibo, analohiya, karakter, at malilinaw na halimbawa.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino understand mas mahusay kapag sila Maaari bang hakbang tungo sa isang scene, role, o simulated konteksto.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na nagnanais ng guided lesson canvas na may mga halimbawa, pagsusuri, at aktibong pagsasanay sa halip na mahabang sagot sa chat.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong magsanay ng active recall, mabilis na pagsasanay, at markang maaari nilang mapabuti.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong magkaroon ng masiglang pagsasanay sa debate gamit ang mga kilalang boses at patas na hamon.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino gusto sharper judgment instead ng faster sagot generation.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong makita kung bakit gumagana ang bawat hakbang sa math, hindi lang basta kumopya ng sagot.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong pag-isipan ang isang paksa, subukin ang mga palagay, at bumuo ng pangmatagalang pag-unawa.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong umunawa sa mga tao, pagpili, at ideya sa kontekstong pangkasaysayan.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral kasama ang isang syllabus, isang deadline, at isang kailangan sa study ano actually matters.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral kasama ang limited oras, large mga layunin, o isang syllabus na kailangan structure.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral working sa pamamagitan ng technical mga paksa kung saan isa unclear hakbang Maaari bang block ang rest.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral pagsusulat essays, pagbabasa complex material, o pagsubok sa judge kung isang pahayag ay well supported.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na sumusulat ng mga sanaysay, kuwento, email, scholarship note, o argumento.

entries.value: Mga mag-aaral, mga magulang, educators, at mga builder comparing AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: Learners, writers, makers, and curious people who want ideas without losing direction.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral, mga manunulat, makers, at curious mga tao sino gusto mga ideya nang walang losing direction.

entries.source: Learning Game Master
entries.value: Learning Game Master

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Pag-aaral Game Master Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Gumawa ng pag-aaral feel like isang game kasama ang quests, mga antas, mga punto, challenges, at boss rounds.
